Interface EcoreHelper

public interface EcoreHelper
Read, write, and navigation operations on Ecore objects, expressed in terms of Simon's conventions.

Operates mostly on EObject model instances: extracting and setting per-instance state (getName(EObject), setName(EObject, String), getDocumentation(EObject), setDocumentation(EObject, String), getValue(EObject, String), getValueAsStream(EObject, String), getUnwrappedValue(EObject, EStructuralFeature)), and walking model trees via containment and attribute-based lookup (tree(EObject), hierarchy(EObject), findChildByAttributeValue(EObject, EAttribute, Object), findByFeature(Collection, String, Object)). A few helpers also navigate metamodel-layer structure: findStructuralFeature(EClass, String), findClassifierByName(EPackage, String), findFeatureInHierarchy(EObject, String).

Simon stores primitive values as wrapped EObjects, so reads and writes that cross the wrapping boundary go through wrappedPrimitiveValue(EClass, Object) and unwrappedPrimitiveValue(EObject).

  • Field Details

    • NONE

      static final EObject NONE

  • Method Details

    • getDocumentation

      static Optional<String> getDocumentation(EObject eObject)
      Returns the documentation comment associated with the given object, if any. Documentation may be attached to metamodel elements directly, or to model instances whose metamodel opts in by declaring an attribute annotated with @Meta.Documentation. Blank results are treated as absent.

    • setDocumentation

      static void setDocumentation(EObject undocumented, String newComment)
      Attaches a documentation comment to the given object. A blank comment clears any existing one. Fails if the target is a model instance whose metamodel does not declare a @Meta.Documentation attribute.
      See Also:
      • getDocumentation(EObject)
